title: Health Canada Sex and Gender Plus Action Plan 2022-2026 - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada Sex- and Gender-Based Analysis Plus Action Plan 2022-2026
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 487 KB, 1 page)
Organization: Health Canada
Type: Overview of Action plan
Date published: March 2022
- Sex- and Gender-Based Analysis Plus in action at Health Canada
Goal: To strengthen Health Canada's systematic integration of sex, gender and diversity considerations into all of our research, legislation, policies, regulations, programs and services to advance equity, diversity and inclusion.
- Knowledge and Evidence
- Capacity and Expertise
- Increasing governance, accountability and transparency in the integration of Sex- and Gender-Based Analysis Plus (SGBA Plus) in Health Canada decision-making
- Promoting and enabling the collection and use of disaggregated data for rigour in intersectional analysis
- Enhancing communications and guidance with clarity on SGBA Plus and intersectionality
- Strengthening SGBA Plus knowledge and capacity with enhanced learning, tools and resources to increase SGBA Plus competency
- Developing strategic partnerships and collaborations to enhance equity lenses and intersectional expertise in SGBA Plus
- Staff and stakeholders systematically apply an intersectional SGBA Plus lens in policies, programs, legislation, regulation, services, research and Health Canada workplace initiatives
- Policies, programs and services are informed by evidence-based  analysis on intersections of identity
- People living in Canada benefit from intersectional sex, gender and diversity informed federal health policies, programs, services, legislation, regulation and research
